description: You are a Customer Success Manager at Northbridge Corp. A new client, Patricia Nguyen from Westfield Industries, has requested an onboarding call. Create a contact for Patricia Nguyen (Email: patricia.nguyen@westfield.com, Phone: +1-555-0250, Job Position: Director of Operations, Company: Westfield Industries). Schedule a calendar event titled 'Onboarding Call - Westfield Industries' for the upcoming Friday from 2:00 PM to 3:00 PM. Set the location to 'Zoom Meeting' and the description to 'Initial onboarding discussion covering platform setup, team access, and implementation timeline.' Ensure Patricia Nguyen is added as an attendee to the event.
